summary: Multi-tenant Organization Architecture Testing Complete. All 24 backend tests PASSED (100%). All 6 frontend UI tests PASSED. Migration from coach→club_coach, platform_admin creation, and org foundation all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Platform admin login returns role=platform_admin with org_id=null
VERIFIED: Director login returns role=director with org_id=org-capymatch-default
VERIFIED: Club coach login returns role=club_coach (migrated from coach) with org_id set
VERIFIED: Athlete login returns role=athlete with org_id set
VERIFIED: GET /api/organizations - platform_admin sees all orgs, director sees own org
VERIFIED: GET /api/organizations/{org_id} returns members, athletes, directors, coaches lists
VERIFIED: POST /api/organizations works for director and platform_admin, 403 for athlete
VERIFIED: POST /api/organizations/{org_id}/invites creates invite with code
VERIFIED: GET /api/admin/dashboard/stats - works for platform_admin and director, 403 for athlete/club_coach
VERIFIED: Registration allows club_coach role, rejects director self-registration
VERIFIED: Smart Match still works after migration
VERIFIED: Platform admin redirects to /admin/dashboard on login
VERIFIED: Director redirects to /mission-control and sees Admin section in sidebar
VERIFIED: Club coach redirects to /mission-control, does NOT see Admin section
VERIFIED: Athlete redirects to /board and does NOT see Admin section
VERIFIED: Registration form shows 'Coach' label with club_coach value internally
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-tenant org architecture fully tested. Key changes verified: coach→club_coach migration, platform_admin role (douglas@capymatch.com), organizations CRUD at /api/organizations, invites at /api/organizations/{org_id}/invites, admin access control via admin_guard.py (platform_admin and director allowed), athlete_user_links collection for parent-athlete linking. All users backfilled with org_id=org-capymatch-default. The org foundation migration is idempotent and runs on every server startup.

login_roles.club_coach: WORKING - coach.williams@capymatch.com returns role=club_coach (migrated from coach)

organizations_crud.list_orgs: WORKING - platform_admin sees all, director sees own
organizations_crud.get_org_detail: WORKING - includes members, athletes, directors, coaches
organizations_crud.invites: WORKING - create and list invites for org members

frontend_routing.platform_admin: WORKING - redirects to /admin/dashboard, Admin section in sidebar
frontend_routing.director: WORKING - redirects to /mission-control, Admin section in sidebar
frontend_routing.club_coach: WORKING - redirects to /mission-control, NO Admin section in sidebar
frontend_routing.athlete: WORKING - redirects to /board, NO Admin section in sidebar

registration.club_coach_role: WORKING - Coach label maps to club_coach internally
